title: Wo de Weixin Tong Longgong

synonyms: My WeChat is connected to Dragon Palace
alternative_titles.en: My WeChat Connects to the Dragon Palace

synopsis:
The orphan boy Luo Yun has a mysterious background. Upon reaching adulthood, he is unexpectedly added to the "East Sea Dragon Palace Chat Group." After exchanging cultivation manuals from fellow immortals in the group, his cultivation soars, and he transforms into "Immortal Luo Yuan" and begins his journey of cultivation between the human and immortal realms. 

Luo Yun relies on the information gap and clever schemes of immortal friends in the WeChat group, trading spicy strips for elixirs and cola for spiritual treasures, constantly improving himself, helping the weak and upholding justice in the real world. As Bawang Seafood Company rises rapidly across both realms, Luo Yun is drawn into the epic conflict between Peach Blossom Spring and the Chaotic Star Sea due to a mystery about his origins......

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
